item.title: Where Does It End?
item.description: The Epstein Files come for the Elect, the white-shoed and royalty. Who's next?

item.title: From The Olympic Track To The FIFA World Cup 26 Pitch: The Legal Fault Line Over Athlete Expression
item.description: As the world’s most watched tournament approaches, FIFA should treat the events in Cortina not as an Olympic issue, but as an early warning.

item.title: EBay Acquires Depop From Etsy for $1.2 Billion
item.description: Etsy plans to utilize the proceeds for general corporate purposes, continued share repurchases and investment in its core marketplace.

item.title: What Frist Cressey Ventures Will Target With Its $425M Healthcare Fund
item.description: Frist Cressey Ventures closed a $425 million fourth fund to invest in early-stage healthcare companies using AI to improve care, reduce costs and supp...

item.title: Danaher Drops $10B to Snatch Masimo in Diagnostics Push
item.description: The move reflects a broader industry shift toward consolidation and integrated care, as large healthcare companies seek scale and more continuous clin...
